name: part_008
file: tmp_【重大告知あり】新３Dお披露目？！癒月ちょこ生誕祭2026🎂 【ホロライブ⧸癒月ちょこ】 [_1PGuuEP7ps]_gemini-3-flash-preview/part_008.webm

scenes.description: Yuzuki Choco and Roboco-san perform 'chocolate box' on a candy-themed stage.
Performance ends followed by a countdown transition on a clock.
Curtain reveal showing a silhouette and then Choco in a new idol costume.
Kazama Iroha joins Choco on stage to perform 'Kokuhaku Biyori, desu!'.

subtitles.original: 二人だけのデコレーションを
subtitles.english: With decorations just for the two of us

subtitles.original: ちりばめて 彩って食べちゃおうか
subtitles.english: Let's scatter them, color them, and eat them up

subtitles.original: 苦い苦い 愛の玉手箱
subtitles.english: A bitter, bitter treasure box of love

subtitles.original: 未来味の不思議なチョコレート
subtitles.english: A mysterious chocolate with the taste of the future

subtitles.original: 温めて混ぜたらきっと
subtitles.english: If you warm it up and mix it, surely

subtitles.original: いつかお口に合う味になるの
subtitles.english: It'll eventually become a taste that suits your palate

subtitles.original: ねえねえ そこいいかな
subtitles.english: Hey, hey, is that spot okay?

subtitles.original: なんで？
subtitles.english: Why?

subtitles.original: さっきはあのね ごめんね
subtitles.english: Earlier, well, I'm sorry

subtitles.original: なにが？
subtitles.english: For what?

subtitles.original: いつももやっとなるじゃん
subtitles.english: It always gets all foggy, right?

subtitles.original: それで？
subtitles.english: And then?

subtitles.original: 今日はこれ渡したくて
subtitles.english: I wanted to give you this today

subtitles.original: 言葉じゃ足りないからさ
subtitles.english: Because words aren't enough

subtitles.original: だから？
subtitles.english: So?

subtitles.original: 受け取ってくれないかな
subtitles.english: Won't you please accept it?

subtitles.original: なにを？
subtitles.english: Accept what?

subtitles.original: 一緒にいてくれてありがとう
subtitles.english: Thank you for being with me

subtitles.original: うわぁ
subtitles.english: Whoa

subtitles.original: なんだよそれ
subtitles.english: What's that about?

subtitles.original: あなたの優しさについつい甘えちゃう
subtitles.english: I end up depending on your kindness

subtitles.original: 誰よりも近いから素直になれない
subtitles.english: I can't be honest because we're closer than anyone

subtitles.original: 君の一生懸命さについつい忘れちゃう
subtitles.english: I end up forgetting due to your hard work

subtitles.original: 誰よりも一番大好きだもんね
subtitles.english: Because I love you the most of all

subtitles.original: 甘い甘い 夢の宝箱
subtitles.english: A sweet, sweet treasure box of dreams

subtitles.original: 奇跡味のナイショのチョコレート
subtitles.english: A secret chocolate with the taste of miracles

subtitles.original: 二人だけのイノベーションを
subtitles.english: An innovation just for the two of us

subtitles.original: 探し組み立てたら賑やか
subtitles.english: If we find and assemble it, it'll be lively

subtitles.original: 苦い苦い 日々の化粧箱
subtitles.english: A bitter, bitter daily makeup box

subtitles.original: 世界味のナイショのチョコレート
subtitles.english: A secret chocolate with the taste of the world

subtitles.original: 冷めきって割れないように
subtitles.english: So it doesn't get cold and break

subtitles.original: 大事に包んで生涯の完成まで
subtitles.english: Carefully wrapped until the completion of a lifetime

subtitles.original: いつだって
subtitles.english: Always

subtitles.original: 病める時も
subtitles.english: Even in sickness

subtitles.original: どんな時も
subtitles.english: No matter when

subtitles.original: そう ずっと
subtitles.english: Yes, forever

subtitles.original: 健やかな時も
subtitles.english: Even in health

subtitles.original: 手を取って
subtitles.english: Taking your hand

subtitles.original: 違う二人を分かつまで
subtitles.english: Until death do us part

subtitles.original: 愛してる
subtitles.english: I love you

subtitles.original: 僕もそうさ
subtitles.english: So do I

subtitles.original: そばにいて
subtitles.english: Stay by my side

subtitles.original: そばにいる
subtitles.english: I'll be there

subtitles.original: なんて嘘かもよ
subtitles.english: That might be a lie

subtitles.original: ああ そうかい 僕も適当に言った
subtitles.english: Ah, I see, I just said it randomly too

subtitles.original: 甘い甘い 苦い苦い
subtitles.english: Sweet, sweet, bitter, bitter

subtitles.original: 甘い甘い 恋の魔法箱
subtitles.english: A sweet, sweet magic box of love

subtitles.original: 宇宙味の秘密のチョコレート
subtitles.english: A secret chocolate with the taste of the cosmos

subtitles.original: 二人だけのデコレーションを
subtitles.english: With decorations just for the two of us

subtitles.original: ちりばめて 彩って食べちゃおうか
subtitles.english: Let's scatter them, color them, and eat them up

subtitles.original: 苦い苦い 愛の玉手箱
subtitles.english: A bitter, bitter treasure box of love

subtitles.original: 未来味の不思議なチョコレート
subtitles.english: A mysterious chocolate with the taste of the future

subtitles.original: 温めて混ぜたら絶対
subtitles.english: If you warm it up and mix it, definitely

subtitles.original: いつか最高に幸せな味になるの
subtitles.english: It'll eventually become the most happy taste

subtitles.original: せーので
subtitles.english: Ready, set...

subtitles.original: Thank you so much
subtitles.english: Thank you so much

subtitles.original: See you next time
subtitles.english: See you next time

subtitles.original: ねえ 一つだけ聞いていい？
subtitles.english: Hey, can I ask just one thing?

subtitles.original: 私のこと...
subtitles.english: About me...

subtitles.original: 告白日和、です！
subtitles.english: Confession Weather, isn't it!

subtitles.original: 会えるかな今日は 心が騒いで
subtitles.english: Can I meet you today? My heart is racing

subtitles.original: 深呼吸したなら トキメキ踊る瞬間
subtitles.english: After taking a deep breath, the moment excitement dances

subtitles.original: 私のことなど たぶん気にしてないの
subtitles.english: You probably don't even care about me...

subtitles.original: だけど ここにいるんだよ 私はここよ
subtitles.english: But I'm right here, I'm right here

subtitles.original: 地面が揺れ動く 嫌われてないかな
subtitles.english: The ground is shaking, I wonder if you hate me

subtitles.original: 意気込みでとにかく 挨拶だ
subtitles.english: With all my determination, just a greeting!

subtitles.original: やっと晴れたね ぱっと晴れたね
subtitles.english: It's finally cleared up! It's suddenly cleared up!

subtitles.original: そして元気になれ
subtitles.english: And then, cheer up!

subtitles.original: おはようの代わりに 背中を叩いて
subtitles.english: Instead of saying good morning, I'll pat your back

subtitles.original: さあ行くよ
subtitles.english: Here we go!

subtitles.original: やっと晴れたら ぱっと晴れたら
subtitles.english: If it finally clears up, if it suddenly clears up

subtitles.original: きっと元気な笑顔
subtitles.english: Surely, a cheerful smile

subtitles.original: なんだか今の この気持ちが 切なくなっちゃったよ
subtitles.english: Somehow, this current feeling has become painful

subtitles.original: 授業は上の空 遠くを眺めたい
subtitles.english: My mind is elsewhere during class, I want to stare into the distance

subtitles.original: 恋って甘いもんじゃない 苦いかも ください半分
subtitles.english: Love isn't something sweet, it might be bitter, give me half
